fields.acceptance_criteria: Make Dioxus the default served frontend, keep dist artifacts ignored, and validate the migrated log-viewer flows end-to-end.
fields.title: [LOG-5f] Cut log-viewer over from Preact/Vite to Dioxus/trunk and lock in migration validation
fields.validation_plan: Run cargo check, viewer-ctl prepare/start log-viewer, and smoke/E2E checks for migrated Dioxus flows.
